description: Triggered when the user wants to deploy to Coolify, create Docker multi-stage builds for Next.js, set up GitHub Actions CI/CD, configure health checks, or manage SSL certificates.
should_trigger: Create a Dockerfile for my Next.js app to deploy on Coolify
Set up GitHub Actions to auto-deploy to Coolify on push to main
How do I configure a health check endpoint for my Docker container?
Deploy my Next.js app with Docker multi-stage build
Set up Let's Encrypt SSL on Coolify for my domain
Configure environment variables for my Coolify deployment
should_not_trigger: Deploy my Next.js app to Vercel
Set up a Kubernetes cluster for my microservices
How do I configure nginx for my static site?
Set up AWS ECS with Fargate for container deployment
